subcodes.first_line: This Wronged One, on this blessed night of Ramadan, maketh mention of the loved ones of the All-Merciful with wondrous praise and glorification [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این مظلوم در این شب مبارک رمضان احبای رحمن را ببدایع ذکر و ثنا ذکر مینماید
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prophecy and fulfillment
